description: Superior quality meets a fashion innovation with these shoes from catwalk. The slip-on style makes it perfect for frequent use Upper Synthetic leather upper with strategically placed overlays Slip-on style and elasticated sides for ease of wearing Crystal embellishments on the forefoot Zipper for style Outsole Circular lugs on the outsole Circular suction points on the forefoot and midfoot area shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
